column_docs.line: Line of business for policy/claim rows; empty otherwise.
column_docs.name: Human-readable label for the entity.
column_docs.parent_id: Join key to the owning entity (policy.holder_id, claim.policy_id).
column_docs.status: Claim status (open/closed/denied); empty for other types.
column_docs.type: One of policyholder | agent | adjuster | policy | claim.

description: Flat id-keyed master-data index. One header row + one row per entity. Tab-separated, UTF-8, columns in fixed order.
title: Meridian Mutual roster (TSV)
